_comment: Scroll theme (PPT Reading View) — region schema (ADR-0045 Decision #2). v3.0.0: TOC drawer replaces thumbnail panel; all PPT features retained.
name: scroll
description: PPT-style reading presentation with highest content density (5 bullets, 30 char titles, 120 char body). TOC drawer navigation, transition effects, speaker script panel, and footer nav. Previously a vertical scroll layout, now transformed to a PPT reading view while retaining its generous content constraints and well-designed PDF region layout.

rendering.navigation: TOC drawer + footer bar — prev/next, transition mode selector, script toggle, timer
rendering.progress_indicator: progress bar (footer) + slide counter + TOC highlight

content_rules.notes: Reading view allows the highest information density. Titles up to 30 chars. Max 5 bullets per slide. Body text up to 120 chars per slide. Best for deep-dive content.

partial_styles.name: visual-heavy
partial_styles.reason: Full-bleed background images work well for cover/divider/visual slides. For text-dense content, prefer classic/academic/minimal.

recommended_structure.pattern: Cover → Speaker Intro → [Part Divider → 8-12 Content → Summary] × N → Contact
recommended_structure.notes: Reading view supports deep dives with high content density. Divider slides mark chapter sections.

author: co-deck
